creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
Patch for updating to 3.2.4:

http://people.freebsd.org/~lwhsu/patch/trafficserver-3.2.4.diff

However, I get stuck with this setting in records.config

CONFIG proxy.config.srv_enabled INT 1

Does anyone have ideas of this?

-- 
Li-Wen Hsu <lwhsu@FreeBSD.org>
